creator: svyatoslav.lempert@gmail.com
text:
http://php.net/manual/en/sqlite.installation.php
Since PHP 5.0 this extension was bundled with PHP. Beginning with PHP 5.4, this extension is available only via PECL.
Now http://www.freshports.org/databases/pecl-sqlite/ was deleted. We should restore this port for work with PHP 5.4 (lang/php5).
Please fix this issue.
